name: crispasr-agent-transcriber
description: Transcribe local audio or video files through CrispASR with local models only. Auto-detects English vs Chinese, routes to Cohere Transcribe or Qwen3-ASR, and extracts audio from video with ffmpeg. No cloud uploads.

interface.shortDescription: Transcribe local audio/video with CrispASR, auto routing, and GPU acceleration
interface.longDescription: Use CrispASR Transcriber to transcribe local audio or video files entirely on your machine. Auto-detects English vs Chinese using FireRed LID, routes to Cohere Transcribe or Qwen3-ASR 1.7B, extracts audio from video with ffmpeg, and outputs text, verbose JSON, SRT, or VTT. No cloud uploads, no API keys. Supports GPU acceleration (CUDA > Vulkan > CPU).
defaultPrompt: Transcribe this local audio or video file with CrispASR
